name: Pink Pickled Shallots (Kn4)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the shallots lengthwise or crosswise into thin slices. Set aside.
2. In a small, non-aluminum saucepan, combine the vinegar, sugar, water, peppercorns, mustard seed, bay leaf, and thyme.
3. Bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Reduce the heat to medium and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and allow to cool.
6. Using a slotted spoon, pack the shallots into clean, dry jars with lids.
7. Ladle in the vinegar mixture, dividing the spices and herbs evenly among the jars.
8. Attach lids. Store the shallots in the refrigerator for at least a week before using. Will keep for several months.
